custom_domain.notes: Custom domains are intentionally not used for the current activation target.

activation_checks.description: Repository Settings > Pages source is set to GitHub Actions.
Canonical workflow validation completed before Pages artifact upload.
The canonical workflow completed build-pages, deploy-pages, and verify-public-pages successfully.
The root project page loads without 404.
A representative Docusaurus route loads under the project base URL.
The public status JSON is reachable as a static asset.
The ontology JSON is reachable as a static asset.
A representative governance proposal JSON is reachable as a static asset.

known_404_causes: Repository Pages source is not set to GitHub Actions.
Canonical workflow has not run since Docusaurus or docs content changed.
Canonical workflow failed during validation, install, build, Pages upload, deploy, or public verification.
Repository visibility or Pages plan does not allow public Pages for this repository.
Browser is checking the old custom-domain or wrong GitHub.io path.
Docusaurus baseUrl does not match the project path.
current_next_action: Run the canonical validate-chain-continuation workflow on main and verify build-pages, deploy-pages, and verify-public-pages complete.
